item.name: Gremlin

description.content: Execute Gremlin graph traversal queries

item.name: Amazon Neptune Execute a Gremlin Query via the Data API

request.name: Amazon Neptune Execute a Gremlin Query via the Data API

description.content: Executes a Gremlin query against the Neptune graph database using the Data API. The query is submitted as a JSON payload and results are returned synchronously.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Bad request - malformed query or invalid parameters.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Execution Plan for a Gremlin Query

request.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Execution Plan for a Gremlin Query

description.content: Executes a Gremlin explain query against the Neptune graph database. Returns the query execution plan without actually running the query against the data.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Profile a Gremlin Query Execution

request.name: Amazon Neptune Profile a Gremlin Query Execution

description.content: Executes a Gremlin profile query against the Neptune graph database. Returns the query execution plan along with actual runtime statistics including execution time and intermediate result counts.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of Gremlin Queries

request.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of Gremlin Queries

description.content: Gets the status of running and waiting Gremlin queries. Returns a list of active queries with their query IDs and statuses.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of a Specific Gremlin Query

query.description: Maximum number of load IDs to return.

item.name: SPARQL

description.content: Execute SPARQL queries against RDF data

item.name: Amazon Neptune Execute a SPARQL Query via the Data API

request.name: Amazon Neptune Execute a SPARQL Query via the Data API

description.content: Executes a SPARQL query against the Neptune RDF graph database using the Data API. Supports SELECT, ASK, CONSTRUCT, and DESCRIBE queries.

urlencoded.description: The SPARQL query string (for SELECT, ASK, CONSTRUCT, DESCRIBE).
The SPARQL update string (for INSERT, DELETE operations).

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Streams

description.content: Change data capture stream operations

item.name: Amazon Neptune Get Property Graph Change Stream Records

request.name: Amazon Neptune Get Property Graph Change Stream Records

description.content: Gets a stream of change-log entries for property graph data. Each entry records a mutation (add, remove) made to the graph data.

query.description: Maximum number of records to return (1-100000, default 10).
The stream position to start reading from.
The commit number to start from.
The operation sequence number within the commit.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Get SPARQL RDF Change Stream Records

request.name: Amazon Neptune Get SPARQL RDF Change Stream Records

description.content: Gets a stream of change-log entries for RDF data. Each entry records a mutation (add, remove) made to the RDF triples.

query.description: Maximum number of records to return (1-100000, default 10).
The stream position to start reading from.
The commit number to start from.
The operation sequence number within the commit.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
AWS region

Amazon Neptune Data API provides SDK support for more than 40 data operations including data loading, query execution, data inquiry, and machine learning. It supports Gremlin and openCypher query languages and provides programmatic access to Neptune graph data through AWS SDKs.

Contact Support:
 Name: Amazon Web Services
